summary: Comprehensive testing of BureauSmart - Bureaucracy Intelligence Engine. All core features working correctly including multilingual UI (14 languages), JWT auth, document analysis, and paywall enforcement.
passed_tests: API health check endpoint working
Admin login with credentials (admin@example.com / Badboy4242-elyasa)
User registration creates inactive subscription user
Duplicate email registration correctly rejected (400)
/auth/me returns correct user data for authenticated session
/auth/me correctly rejects unauthenticated requests (401)
Logout endpoint works correctly
Documents list endpoint requires authentication
Document search endpoint works
Paywall: Non-subscriber gets 403 on /api/documents/generate-text
Paywall: Admin bypasses paywall (gets 404 for fake doc, not 403)
Paywall: Non-subscriber gets 403 on /api/documents/improve-text
Checkout endpoint requires authentication
Dashboard loads with German text (default language)
Language switcher shows 14 languages (de, en, fr, es, it, nl, pl, tr, pt, ru, ar, zh, ja, ko)
Switching to English changes all Dashboard UI text correctly
Switching to French changes all Dashboard UI text correctly
Switching back to German restores original text
Register page shows translated text when language is switched
Landing page renders with language switcher and translations
Landing page Japanese translation works correctly
Non-subscriber sees upgrade button (PRO für 1,99 €/Monat)
Non-subscriber does NOT see PRO badge
Admin sees PRO badge
Admin sees 'Text generieren' button (not locked)
Document analysis view shows AI analysis with summary, priority, deadline, amount, sender
Priority labels translate correctly (Hoch/High/Élevé)
Search input filters documents by filename
Document language detection works (shows 'Türkisch' for Turkish document)
seed_data_creation: Admin user seeded on startup with active subscription
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 14 languages working correctly. Language switcher uses data-testid='language-switcher' and individual options use data-testid='lang-option-{code}'. Paywall enforcement working on both frontend (upgrade button, no PRO badge for non-subscribers) and backend (403 for generate-text and improve-text endpoints). Document analysis view shows AI-generated summary with priority labels that translate based on selected language.
